Focus on pitching control next time.","drillsRun":"Dynamic Warm-Up, Home to First Sprint, Pitch Location Work, Points-Based Hitting, Bunt Stations, Batting Queen, 21 Outs Drill","groups":{}},{"id":"1775772613496","date":"2026-04-09","time":"16:45","duration":120,"focus":"Assessment","drills":[{"id":"w1","name":"Dynamic Warm-Up","category":"Warm-Up","duration":10,"coach":"Any","description":"Jog, arm circles, high knees, butt kicks, lunges, karaokes, leg swings. Get blood flowing and muscles loose before throwing. Every practice starts here.","assignedCoach":"Any","phase":"Warm-Up & Throwing","phaseType":"together","station":null},{"id":"t2","name":"Rock & Fire","category":"Throwing","duration":10,"coach":"Shari","description":"Players rock weight back and forth 3 times, then throw on the final forward shift. Teaches proper weight transfer during the throw. Top drill from Covey Sports for 10U-12U age groups.","assignedCoach":"Throwing","notes":"Rock & Fire — assess arm strength","phase":"Warm-Up & Throwing","phaseType":"together","station":null},{"id":"f1","name":"Ground Ball Fundamentals","category":"Fielding","duration":15,"coach":"Ken","description":"Ready position (athletic stance, glove out front), charge the ball, field out in front with two hands, funnel to chest, transfer, crow hop, throw. Roll grounders at varying speeds. The foundation of all infield defense.","assignedCoach":"Infield","station":"A","notes":"Assess fielding — speed, hands, accuracy","phase":"Station Rotations","phaseType":"stations"},{"id":"h3","name":"Inside/Outside Tee","category":"Hitting","duration":15,"coach":"Any","description":"Move the tee to different pitch locations — inside, outside, high, low. Teaches players to adjust their swing path and hit the ball to all parts of the field. Every hitter needs this. GoRout recommended.","assignedCoach":"Hitting","station":"B","notes":"Inside/outside tee — assess swing path","phase":"Station Rotations","phaseType":"stations"},{"id":"f8","name":"Cone Fielding Triangle","category":"Fielding","duration":15,"coach":"Ken","description":"Use your cones to create triangle patterns. Coach rolls grounders to different angles — left, right, straight on. Players work on lateral movement, approach angles, and setting feet to throw. Uses your agility cone set.","assignedCoach":"Infield","station":"C","notes":"Cone triangle — assess footwork & angles","phase":"Station Rotations","phaseType":"stations"},{"id":"b1","name":"Home to First Sprint","category":"Baserunning","duration":10,"coach":"Any","description":"Timed sprints from batter's box to first base. Emphasize running THROUGH the bag (not slowing down), hitting the front edge of the base, and turning right toward foul territory. Time each girl and track improvement.","assignedCoach":"Any","notes":"Time every player — record for tracking","phase":"Baserunning Assessment","phaseType":"together","station":null},{"id":"b6","name":"Four Corners Box Drill","category":"Baserunning","duration":10,"coach":"Any","description":"Set up 4 cones in a box 15x15 ft. Sprint to each cone, touch it, sprint to next. Focus on quick direction changes and acceleration. Builds explosive first-step speed for stealing bases and beating throws. Use your agility cone set.","assignedCoach":"Any","notes":"Four corners box — assess explosive first-step","phase":"Baserunning Assessment","phaseType":"together","station":null},{"id":"b2","name":"Rounding Bases","category":"Baserunning","duration":10,"coach":"Any","description":"Practice the banana curve when rounding bases — arc out slightly before the base, hit the inside corner, and accelerate toward the next base. Use cones to mark the ideal path.","assignedCoach":"Any","notes":"Assess rounding technique","phase":"Baserunning Assessment","phaseType":"together","station":null},{"id":"h11","name":"Batting Queen","category":"Hitting","duration":15,"coach":"Any","description":"From 2025: Progressive 6-level hitting competition. 1-Make Contact, 2-Has to be Fair, 3-Past the Pitcher, 4-Past Pitcher in the Air, 5-Only Touch Grass (not dirt), 6-Furthest Hit. Girls love this — great energy and competition.","assignedCoach":"Any","notes":"Batting Queen — see who thrives under pressure","phase":"Hitting Competition","phaseType":"together","station":null},{"id":"m1","name":"Team Mental Huddle","category":"Mental","duration":5,"coach":"Head Coach","description":"5-minute talk on ONE mental skill. Topics: positive self-talk, shaking off errors, cheering for teammates, what to focus on during at-bats, being a good teammate, handling pressure. Pick one per practice — don't overload.","assignedCoach":"Leadership","notes":"Topic: Every player brings something unique to this team","phase":"Huddle","phaseType":"together","station":null}],"notes":"Week 3-4.
